description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant blue and white floral pattern across its fabric upper. The shoe has a white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, white laces, and a white midsole with a slightly textured outsole. The tongue is padded and displays an orange Nike label, while the collar is also padded for ankle support. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather and textile materials, with visible stitching reinforcing the panels. The shoe appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A high-top sneaker with a blue and white floral pattern, white Nike Swoosh, and white laces, featuring an orange Nike label on the tongue.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the full floral pattern, white Swoosh, and laces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing, toe box, and orange Nike label on the tongue.
description_view_2: Right side view with the floral pattern and Swoosh, similar to the left but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, padded collar, and a glimpse of the orange tongue label.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides; orange Nike label on the tongue
